all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And, behold, I am with thee, and will keep thee in all places whither thou goest, and will bring thee again into this land; for I will not leave thee, until I have done that which I have spoken to thee of.
Genesis 28:15
Quote of the Day
"Reconciliation brings not only relief from feelings of guilt but also peace within ourselves and with others."
Elder Kelly R. Johnson | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
